title: Nevada: opt out of sale, but no general deletion right
summary: Nevada has no comprehensive consumer-privacy law, but a narrower law lets you tell certain website and online-service operators not to sell your covered personal information. It does not provide a general right to delete. For removal, use the data broker's own opt-out (below).
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice, and not yet independently reviewed. Nevada's right is limited to opting out of sale by covered operators — verify before relying on it.
